instruction:
It is known that the defect rate of a certain product is 0.01. Now, suppose 100 items are randomly selected for inspection. Let $A$ represent "approximately 2 defective products are found among the selected items." What is the probability of $A$? Where
$$
A={\frac{0.6}{1}}+{\frac{1}{2}}+{\frac{0.5}{3}}
$$

Options:
A. 0.432
B. 0.361
C. 0.678
D. 0.392
E. 0.538
F. 0.316
G. 0.524
H. 0.284
I. 0.274
J. 0.486
